name: Chinese Pepper Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine 1 tablespoon vegetable oil, soy sauce, garlic, ginger root, and cornstarch. Toss the chicken in the sauce to coat and marinate for 30 minutes.
2. In a wok, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil over high heat. Cook the bell peppers and celery, stirring frequently until they are softened. Add green onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes. Remove the vegetables from the wok.
3. Drain the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels. Add the chicken to the wok and stir-fry until it is cooked through, about 3 minutes.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients in a small bowl. Add this mixture to the chicken with the vegetables. Simmer for 3 minutes.
